engineGuide.h2: Toyota 4 Runner Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Toyota 4 Runner across all UK grey import generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 4.0L Petrol
entries.history: Dominant UK import engine; VVT-i V6 with timing chain, known for guide wear pre-2010.
compatibleVariants: SR5, Limited, TRD Pro, Trail Edition, Venture Edition, Nightshade Edition, 40th Anniversary Edition
commonFailures: Timing chain guide wear causing cold-start rattle (80k-120k miles)
Head gasket weakness on pre-2010 units (upgraded with MLS)
VVT-i solenoid clogging leading to P0011/P0012 codes
entries.cta: Get quotes for 1GR-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 3.5L Petrol
entries.history: Smaller-displacement V6 option in select markets; less common in UK imports but shares GR-family architecture.
commonFailures: Water pump seal leakage typical at higher mileage
VVT-i actuator wear causing timing codes
Oil consumption on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for 2GR-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 2.7L Petrol
entries.history: Modern replacement for 3RZ-FE; chain-driven I4 with VVT-i, dominant in post-2010 base/SR5 imports.
compatibleVariants: SR5, Base Model, Trail Edition, Venture Edition
commonFailures: Oil consumption due to piston ring design (60k-100k miles)
Timing cover oil leaks at front seal
PCV valve clogging exacerbating oil burn
entries.cta: Get quotes for 2TR-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 4.7L Petrol
entries.history: Smooth torque-rich V8 for Limited/Sport variants; chain-driven with VVT-i, prized for towing capability.
commonFailures: Oil control valve (OCV) clogging causing rough idle
Timing cover gasket leaks at front seal
VVT-i gear bolt fatigue (recall item on some markets)
entries.cta: Get quotes for 2UZ-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 4.6L Petrol
entries.history: Modern V8 replacement for 2UZ-FE; dual VVT-i with improved efficiency, rare in UK 4 Runner imports.
commonFailures: VVT-i gear bolt recall item (early production)
Oil consumption on high-mileage units
Water pump seal leakage typical
entries.cta: Get quotes for 1UR-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 5.7L Petrol
entries.history: Maximum-displacement V8 for late fifth-generation imports; flex-fuel capable, requires UK emissions adaptation.
commonFailures: Flex-fuel sensor corrosion on E85-capable units
VVT-i actuator wear causing timing codes
Oil consumption on high-mileage examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for 3UR-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 3.4L Petrol
entries.history: Beloved classic V6 for third-generation 4 Runners; belt-driven with proven reliability when MLS gasket upgraded.
commonFailures: Head gasket failure pre-2000 (upgraded with MLS gasket)
Timing belt service critical at 90k-mile intervals
Rear main seal oil leaks common at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for 5VZ-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 2.7L Petrol
entries.history: Predecessor to 2TR-FE; belt-driven I4 with robust bottom end, common in third-generation imports.
commonFailures: Timing belt service critical; failure causes valve damage
Oil leaks at valve cover gaskets and rear main seal
Water pump leakage typical at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for 3RZ-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Petrol
entries.history: Early V6 option for second-generation imports; belt-driven with carburettor or EFI, requires diligent maintenance.
commonFailures: Head gasket failure (non-MLS design)
Timing belt wear critical; interference engine
Water pump and thermostat housing leaks
entries.cta: Get quotes for 3VZ-E Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: Vintage carburettor/mechanical injection I4 for earliest imports; simple, repairable, prized by restorers.
commonFailures: Mechanical fuel pump diaphragm failure
Carburettor jet clogging from ethanol fuels
Timing chain tensioner wear causing rattle
entries.cta: Get quotes for 22R-E Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Diesel
entries.history: Rare turbo diesel import; mechanical injection pump design requires specialist UK expertise for rebuilds.
compatibleVariants: SR5 (rare diesel import), Limited (rare diesel import)
commonFailures: Injector pump wear causing hard starting and smoke
Turbocharger seal failure leading to oil consumption
EGR valve clogging on post-2007 emissions-compliant units
entries.cta: Get quotes for 1KZ-TE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Toyota 4 Runner Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Toyota 4 Runner's most common replacement enquiries centre on the 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 and 2TR-FE 2.7L I4 engines, with timing chain guide wear and oil consumption being the dominant failure patterns. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section as a decision tool to compare repair vs replacement costs for your specific variant.

problems.h4: 1GR-FE Timing Chain Guide Failure - Why Early 4.0L V6 Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Toyota 4 Runner SR5, Limited, TRD Pro (2003-2009, 1GR-FE 4.0L V6)
problems.rootCause: Plastic timing chain guides become brittle with heat cycles, leading to rattle on cold start and eventual chain jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace plastic guides with upgraded metal units before chain damage occurs
repairOptions.longevity: Adds 40-60k miles if caught early; not viable once chain has jumped

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace guides, tensioner, chain, VVT-i gears and seals
repairOptions.longevity: Restores factory spec; suitable if block/head undamaged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 1GR-FE with upgraded guides, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective solution once bottom-end damage has occurred

problems.recommendation: On a Toyota 4 Runner worth £8,000-£15,000, preventative guide replacement at 70k miles offers excellent value. If you're hearing cold-start rattle above 90k miles, budget for full replacement - continued driving risks catastrophic valve/piston damage.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 1GR-FE engine prices for your Toyota 4 Runner

problems.h4: 2TR-FE Oil Consumption - The 2.7L I4 Piston Ring Issue
problems.affectedModels: Toyota 4 Runner SR5, Base, Trail Edition (2010-2024, 2TR-FE 2.7L I4)
problems.rootCause: Factory piston rings allow excessive oil passage into combustion chamber, leading to blue smoke and low oil warnings.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve cover gaskets and oil seals
repairOptions.longevity: May reduce consumption temporarily; not a permanent fix

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Engine removal, head off, replace rings with upgraded design
repairOptions.longevity: Restores oil control; labour-intensive but cost-effective vs replacement

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded rings, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when consumption exceeds 1L/1,000 miles or compression is low

problems.recommendation: If your 2TR-FE is consuming less than 0.5L/1,000 miles, monitor and top up. Beyond that threshold, rebuilt replacement typically offers better long-term value than ring replacement, especially on higher-mileage examples.
problems.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt 2TR-FE Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

problems.h4: 2UZ-FE Oil Control Valve Failure - V8 Reliability Concern
problems.affectedModels: Toyota 4 Runner Limited, Sport Edition (2003-2009, 2UZ-FE 4.7L V8)
problems.rootCause: Oil control valves (OCV) for VVT-i system clog with sludge, causing rough idle, loss of power and check engine lights.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace both bank OCVs and filters
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if caught early; sludge indicates broader maintenance issues

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace VVT-i gears, timing chain components and seals
repairOptions.longevity: Restores variable timing function; prevents future OCV failures

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt V8 with upgraded OCVs, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if sludge damage extends to bearings or camshafts

problems.recommendation: The 2UZ-FE is fundamentally robust. If OCV failure is isolated and the engine has full service history, cleaning/replacement is cost-effective. For neglected examples with sludge, rebuilt replacement protects your investment.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2UZ-FE V8 engine prices for your Toyota 4 Runner

problems.h4: 5VZ-FE Head Gasket Failure - Classic 3.4L V6 Weak Point
problems.rootCause: Factory head gaskets (pre-2000) lack multi-layer steel (MLS) reinforcement, leading to coolant/oil mixing under thermal stress.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove heads, machine surfaces, fit upgraded MLS gaskets
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if block/head undamaged; prevents recurrence

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with MLS gaskets, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if overheating caused warping or bearing wear

problems.recommendation: On a well-maintained classic 4 Runner, MLS gasket upgrade is a worthwhile preventative investment. If overheating has occurred, rebuilt replacement is safer and often similarly priced once machining costs are factored in.
problems.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt 5VZ-FE engine for your Toyota 4 Runner

problems.h4: VVT-i Solenoid Failure - Common Across Multiple Engine Codes
problems.rootCause: Oil control solenoids clog with carbon/varnish, causing timing codes (P0011/P0012), rough idle and reduced power.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace VVT-i solenoids and filters
repairOptions.longevity: Highly effective if oil changes were regular; inexpensive first step

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace solenoids, gears, chains and seals on affected bank
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if codes persist after solenoid replacement

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded VVT-i components
repairOptions.longevity: Only if VVT-i failure caused secondary damage (valves, pistons)

problems.recommendation: VVT-i solenoid failure is rarely catastrophic. Start with cleaning/replacement - it resolves 80% of cases. Only consider rebuild if diagnostic confirms mechanical timing damage.
problems.cta: Compare VVT-i solenoid repair vs rebuilt engine quotes for your Toyota 4 Runner

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Toyota 4 Runner
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're dealing with 1GR-FE timing chain rattle, 2TR-FE oil consumption, or V8 oil control valve issues, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Toyota 4 Runner specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Get back on the road with confidence - without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Toyota 4 Runner Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Toyota 4 Runner and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.4L 22R-E powered the earliest UK-imported 4 Runners (1984-1989), offering simple carburettor or mechanical injection reliability for vintage collectors and restorers.

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 2.7L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.7L displacement spans two distinct engine families: the classic 3RZ-FE (1996-2002) and the modern 2TR-FE (2010-2024), with the latter dominating current UK import replacement demand.
items.cta: Compare Toyota 4 Runner 2.7L petrol engine prices

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 3.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.0L 3VZ-E V6 powered second-generation imports (1990-1995), offering smoother power than the 4-cylinder but requiring diligent timing belt maintenance to avoid catastrophic failure.
items.cta: Compare Toyota 4 Runner 3.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 3.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.4L 5VZ-FE V6 was the heart of the popular third-generation 4 Runner (1996-2002), renowned for durability but requiring the MLS head gasket upgrade on pre-2000 units.
commonFailurePoints: Head gasket failure pre-2000 (upgraded with MLS)
oil leaks at rear main seal
items.cta: Compare Toyota 4 Runner 3.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 4.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 4.0L 1GR-FE V6 is the dominant engine in UK grey import 4 Runners (2003-2024), powering most SR5, Limited and TRD Pro variants, with timing chain guide wear the primary failure concern.
items.cta: Get quotes for Toyota 4 Runner 4.0L petrol engines

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 4.7L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 4.7L 2UZ-FE V8 was offered in Limited and Sport Edition imports (2003-2009), delivering smooth torque for towing and off-road use, with oil control valve failure the most common issue.

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner 5.7L Petrol Engines

fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Toyota 4 Runner engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early 2.4L carburettor units to the latest 4.0L VVT-i V6.

items.title: Toyota 4 Runner Petrol Engines
items.description: Petrol engines dominate UK Toyota 4 Runner imports, with the 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 and 2TR-FE 2.7L I4 accounting for over 85% of replacement enquiries across SR5, Limited and TRD Pro variants.
items.descriptor: Petrol engines dominate UK Toyota 4 Runner imports, with the 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 and 2TR-FE 2.7L I4 accounting for over 85% of replacement enquiries across SR5, Limited and TRD Pro variants.
items.familiesLabel: Common Toyota 4 Runner Petrol Engine Families
families: 1GR-FE - dominant 4.0L V6 (2003-2024), timing chain guide wear risk
2TR-FE - reliable 2.7L I4 (2010-2024), oil consumption common above 80k miles
2UZ-FE - smooth 4.7L V8 (2003-2009), oil control valve failure typical
5VZ-FE - classic 3.4L V6 (1996-2002), head gasket MLS upgrade recommended
knownFor: Strong off-road torque and towing capability across all displacements
1GR-FE timing chain rattle on cold start between 80k-120k miles
2TR-FE oil consumption requiring upgraded piston rings for permanent fix
High UK replacement demand on SR5 and TRD Pro variants

engineYears.h2: Toyota 4 Runner Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Toyota 4 Runner's UK grey import history, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The original 4 Runner introduced to UK imports via grey market, featuring simple carburettor or mechanical injection engines prized by restorers.
keyChanges: First-generation 4 Runner body style introduced to UK via Japanese imports
Carburettor 22R and fuel-injected 22R-E engines offered
Part-time 4WD system with manual locking hubs standard
knownFor: Simple, repairable mechanical design ideal for vintage restoration
Carburettor jet clogging with modern ethanol fuels
Timing chain tensioner wear causing cold-start rattle
Strong collector interest driving premium rebuild demand
years.cta: Get quotes for 1984-1989 Toyota 4 Runner replacement engines
years.ticker: Toyota 4 Runner 22R-E rebuild cost • Toyota 4 Runner carburettor service UK • Toyota 4 Runner vintage engine specialist

years.description: Second-generation imports brought the first V6 option to UK 4 Runners, expanding capability but introducing timing belt maintenance criticality.
keyChanges: New body style with integrated bed and improved aerodynamics
3VZ-E 3.0L V6 introduced alongside carryover 22R-E
Automatic transmission became more common in UK imports
knownFor: 3VZ-E head gasket weakness requiring MLS upgrade on pre-1993 units
Timing belt service critical at 90k miles (interference engine)
Improved off-road capability versus first generation
Growing collector interest in well-preserved examples
years.ticker: Toyota 4 Runner 3VZ-E head gasket • Toyota 4 Runner timing belt service • Toyota 4 Runner V6 rebuild cost UK
enquiries: Toyota 4 Runner V6 rebuild cost UK

years.description: The popular third generation introduced the robust 5VZ-FE 3.4L V6, becoming the benchmark for reliability in UK-imported 4 Runners.
keyChanges: New body style with improved crash safety and interior space
5VZ-FE 3.4L V6 replaced 3VZ-E as primary engine option
3RZ-FE 2.7L I4 offered as entry-level powertrain
knownFor: 5VZ-FE head gasket failure pre-2000; MLS upgrade recommended
Timing belt service critical on both engines at 90k miles
Strong aftermarket support for off-road modifications
High UK replacement demand on SR5 and Limited variants
years.cta: Get quotes for 1996-2002 Toyota 4 Runner replacement engines
years.ticker: Toyota 4 Runner 5VZ-FE head gasket MLS • Toyota 4 Runner 3RZ-FE timing belt • Toyota 4 Runner third generation rebuild

years.description: Fourth-generation imports brought the dominant 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 and optional 2UZ-FE 4.7L V8 to UK buyers, with timing chain replacing belts.
keyChanges: New body style with independent front suspension
1GR-FE 4.0L V6 with timing chain replaced belt-driven V6
2UZ-FE 4.7L V8 offered in Limited/Sport for maximum torque
VVT-i variable valve timing introduced across engine range
knownFor: 1GR-FE timing chain guide wear causing cold-start rattle (80k-120k miles)
2UZ-FE oil control valve clogging leading to rough idle
VVT-i solenoid failures common across both engine codes
High UK replacement demand on SR5 and TRD Pro variants
years.ticker: Toyota 4 Runner 1GR-FE timing chain • Toyota 4 Runner 2UZ-FE oil control valve • Toyota 4 Runner fourth generation rebuild cost
enquiries: Toyota 4 Runner fourth generation rebuild cost

years.description: Fifth-generation imports refined the 1GR-FE V6 and introduced the efficient 2TR-FE 2.7L I4, with improved emissions and reliability updates.
keyChanges: Facelifted body style with enhanced safety and tech features
2TR-FE 2.7L I4 introduced as entry-level engine option
1GR-FE received updated head gasket and timing components post-2010
Enhanced emissions systems requiring UK compliance adaptation
mainEngines: 1GR-FE - 4.0L petrol V6 (SR5 / Limited / TRD Pro / Trail / Venture)
knownFor: 2TR-FE oil consumption due to piston ring design (60k-100k miles)
1GR-FE improved reliability post-2010 but guide wear still possible
VVT-i solenoid clogging remains common across engine codes
Strong demand for TRD Pro and Trail Edition specialist rebuilds
years.cta: Get quotes for 2010-2024 Toyota 4 Runner replacement engines
years.ticker: Toyota 4 Runner 2TR-FE oil consumption • Toyota 4 Runner 1GR-FE post-2010 rebuild • Toyota 4 Runner TRD Pro engine specialist
enquiries: Toyota 4 Runner TRD Pro engine specialist

years.description: Sixth-generation 4 Runners feature the new T24A-FTS 2.4L turbo hybrid powertrain; not yet present in UK grey imports but anticipated.
keyChanges: All-new body style with modern tech and safety features
T24A-FTS 2.4L turbo hybrid replaces V6 as standard powertrain
i-FORCE MAX hybrid system pairs electric motor with turbo petrol
Enhanced emissions compliance simplifying UK import adaptation
knownFor: Hybrid system complexity requiring specialist diagnostic equipment
Turbocharger maintenance critical for longevity
Limited UK specialist availability pending import volume growth
Anticipated high demand for TRD Pro hybrid specialist rebuilds
years.cta: Enquire about Toyota 4 Runner 2025+ engine availability

faq.h2: Toyota 4 Runner Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement costs range from £1,200 for a used 2.4L unit to £5,800 for a rebuilt 5.7L V8, with the dominant 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 typically £1,800-£3,850 rebuilt supply-only.
keyPoints: Rebuilt 1GR-FE 4.0L V6: £1,800-£3,850 supply-only UK
Rebuilt 2TR-FE 2.7L I4: £1,450-£2,950 supply-only UK
Used engines start ~£550 but carry higher risk and shorter warranty
Supply & fit labour adds £450-£1,200 depending on garage location
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Toyota 4 Runner engine prices for your variant

items.question: What engine codes fit my Toyota 4 Runner?
items.answer: Your Toyota 4 Runner's engine code depends on generation and variant: 1GR-FE (4.0L V6, 2003-2024), 2TR-FE (2.7L I4, 2010-2024), or 2UZ-FE (4.7L V8, 2003-2009) dominate UK imports.
keyPoints: Enter your registration above for instant engine code verification
1GR-FE powers most SR5, Limited and TRD Pro imports
2TR-FE is standard on base/SR5 models from 2010 onward
Rare diesel imports may have 1KZ-TE; confirm via chassis number
items.cta: Verify Toyota 4 Runner engine compatibility with our VIN checker

items.question: Is a rebuilt Toyota 4 Runner engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes - rebuilt Toyota 4 Runner engines from EngineMarket specialists include upgraded components addressing known failure points and carry a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.
keyPoints: Upgraded timing guides fitted to 1GR-FE rebuilds prevent recurrence
Piston ring upgrades on 2TR-FE address oil consumption issues
All engines bench-tested with compression report before dispatch
Warranty backed by UK-based support for grey import peace of mind
items.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt Toyota 4 Runner engines with warranty

items.question: How long does Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only rebuilt engines typically dispatch in 3-5 working days; supply & fit service at certified UK garages usually completes within 3-7 days depending on parts availability.
keyPoints: Used engines often available for next-day dispatch from stock
Rebuilt engines require 3-5 days for final testing and documentation
Supply & fit bookings depend on garage schedule; book early
Express rebuild options available for urgent replacements (premium pricing)
items.cta: Book Toyota 4 Runner engine supply & fit with guaranteed timeframe

items.question: Will a replacement engine pass UK MoT?
items.answer: Yes - all Toyota 4 Runner replacement engines supplied through EngineMarket are adapted for UK emissions compliance and include documentation to support MoT certification for grey imports.
keyPoints: ECU adaptation for Japanese-spec engines included where required
Emissions test data provided with rebuilt engine documentation
Network garages experienced with grey import MoT requirements
Compliance certificate available on request for DVLA registration
items.cta: Enquire about MoT-compliant Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement

items.question: Can I upgrade my Toyota 4 Runner engine size?
items.answer: Engine swaps are possible on Toyota 4 Runner but require specialist fabrication, ECU recalibration and DVLA notification; we focus on like-for-like replacements for guaranteed compatibility.
keyPoints: 2TR-FE to 1GR-FE swap requires transmission and wiring harness changes
V8 swaps (2UZ-FE/3UR-FE) need cooling and exhaust system upgrades
DVLA requires V5C amendment and potential re-testing after major changes
Like-for-like rebuilt replacements offer best value and reliability
items.cta: Compare like-for-like Toyota 4 Runner engine replacement options

items.question: What warranty comes with Toyota 4 Runner replacement engines?
items.answer: Every rebuilt or reconditioned Toyota 4 Runner engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering parts and labour at any UK garage.
keyPoints: Warranty valid UK-wide; no mileage restrictions
Covers manufacturing defects and component failure post-installation
Transferable if vehicle is sold within warranty period
Used engines typically carry shorter 3-6 month supplier warranties
items.cta: Compare Toyota 4 Runner engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: How do I know if my Toyota 4 Runner needs engine replacement?
items.answer: Key signs include persistent blue/white exhaust smoke, metallic knocking noises, loss of compression on testing, or coolant/oil mixing - get a specialist diagnosis before deciding repair vs replace.
keyPoints: Cold-start rattle on 1GR-FE suggests timing chain guide wear
Oil consumption >1L/1,000 miles on 2TR-FE indicates ring wear
Compression test below 120psi on any cylinder warrants replacement consideration
Diagnostic code P0011/P0012 may indicate VVT-i solenoid failure (often repairable)
items.cta: Get a Toyota 4 Runner engine diagnostic quote from UK specialists

items.answer: EngineMarket's network includes certified garages across the UK experienced with grey import Toyota 4 Runner engine replacements; enter your postcode to find your nearest specialist.
keyPoints: Postcode checker locates grey import-specialist garages near you
All network garages vetted for Toyota 4 Runner expertise
Mobile fitting options available in select regions for urgent cases
Single-point warranty covers parts and labour for supply & fit bookings
items.cta: Find Toyota 4 Runner engine supply & fit near you with postcode checker

items.question: Are Toyota 4 Runner replacement engines VAT inclusive?
items.answer: Prices displayed on EngineMarket are VAT-inclusive for consumer customers; business customers can request VAT-exclusive invoices with valid VAT number for reclaim purposes.
keyPoints: Consumer quotes include 20% UK VAT by default
Business customers: provide VAT number for exclusive pricing
Supply & fit labour charges also VAT-inclusive for consumers
Full invoice documentation provided for insurance or warranty claims
